headline: Interactive Brokers Client Growth And Stablecoin Funding Reshape Engagement Story
summary: Interactive Brokers Group (NasdaqGS:IBKR) reported strong client growth and higher client activity for February 2026. The broker also introduced stablecoin funding for U.S. clients, aiming to shorten funding times and speed up access to trading capital. These developments add a new funding option alongside traditional methods, with potential implications for client experience and competitive positioning. Interactive Brokers Group, known for its electronic trading platform and global market...
